sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33781" key="e)llale/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλλᾰλέω</orth>, <sense id="n33781.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">talk amongst</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μειρακίοις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">64</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (prob.).</sense> </entryFree>
